Overview

Choosing between Notion AI and Smartsheet is a common dilemma for professionals looking for the right solution. Both platforms have carved out significant market positions, but they take notably different approaches to solving similar problems. In this comprehensive comparison, we analyze every aspect that matters — from features and pricing to user experience and support — so you can make an informed decision.

Feature Analysis

Both Notion AI and Smartsheet share a solid foundation of core features including Task Management, Ai Assistant, Calendar, Collaboration. Where Notion AI pulls ahead is with exclusive access to Notes, which can be a deciding factor for teams that rely on this capability. On the other hand, Smartsheet uniquely offers Analytics, giving it an edge for users who prioritize this area. Looking at user ratings, Notion AI holds an overall score of 9/10 and an ease of use score of 7/10, while Smartsheet scores 7/10 overall and 6/10 for ease of use. These ratings reflect real user experiences and can indicate differences in usability, support quality, and overall satisfaction.

Pricing Breakdown

When it comes to pricing, Notion AI offers a more budget-friendly entry point at Free, compared to Smartsheet's starting price of $9/mo. Notion AI has a notable advantage here with its free plan, allowing you to get started without any financial commitment. Smartsheet does not currently offer a free tier, which means you will need to pay from day one.

Pros & Cons

Notion AI

  • Incredibly flexible all-in-one workspace
  • AI assistant works across all content
  • Massive template ecosystem

Cons

  • -Can be overwhelming to set up
  • -Performance with large databases
  • -Offline support is limited

Smartsheet

  • Familiar spreadsheet interface
  • Powerful for resource management
  • Strong enterprise governance

Cons

  • -Feels dated compared to modern tools
  • -Expensive for full features
  • -Learning curve for advanced features

Who Should Choose Which?

The ideal user for each platform differs considerably. Notion AI is best suited for knowledge workers, startups, content teams, making it a strong choice if you fall into any of these categories. Smartsheet, meanwhile, shines for PMOs, construction, enterprise operations, which means it may be the better pick if your needs align with those use cases. Founded in 2013, Notion AI describes itself as "AI-powered workspace combining notes, docs, tasks, and databases." Smartsheet, established in 2005, positions itself as "Spreadsheet-based work management platform with AI automation for enterprises." With 8 years between them, Smartsheet brings the maturity and proven track record of a veteran platform, while Notion AI offers the fresh perspective and modern architecture of a newer entrant.

Our Verdict

After analyzing all the data, **Notion AI** comes out slightly ahead in this comparison, thanks to higher user ratings (9.0 vs 7.0), availability of a free plan. However, this does not mean Smartsheet is a poor choice — far from it. Smartsheet excels in its own right, particularly for PMOs and construction. Our recommendation: if you value incredibly flexible all-in-one workspace, go with Notion AI. If familiar spreadsheet interface matters more to you, Smartsheet is the way to go. Either way, both are solid platforms that have earned their place in the market.

Frequently Asked Questions

Is Notion AI better than Smartsheet?
It depends on your needs. Notion AI scores 9.0 overall while Smartsheet scores 7.0. Notion AI is best for knowledge workers and startups, while Smartsheet excels for PMOs and construction.
Which is cheaper, Notion AI or Smartsheet?
Notion AI starts at Free and Smartsheet starts at $9/mo. Notion AI offers a free plan. Overall value depends on which features you need.
Can I switch from Notion AI to Smartsheet?
Yes, most users can migrate between these platforms. Both Notion AI and Smartsheet support data import/export. The migration process typically involves exporting your data from one platform and importing it into the other. Some tools also offer migration assistance to make the transition smoother.
What do users say about Notion AI vs Smartsheet?
On review platforms, Notion AI holds an overall rating of 9/10 and an ease of use score of 7/10. Smartsheet has an overall rating of 7/10 and ease of use score of 6/10. Users praise Notion AI for incredibly flexible all-in-one workspace and Smartsheet for familiar spreadsheet interface.
Which should I choose in 2026, Notion AI or Smartsheet?
In 2026, we recommend Notion AI for most users based on its overall score and feature set. However, Smartsheet remains a strong contender, especially if you prioritize familiar spreadsheet interface. Try both free trials before committing.
